title: Roman Forum role-specific multi-Agent debate
user_goal: As a knowledge worker, ask philosopher, engineer, historian and ethicist Agents to discuss a philosophy topic, challenge each other and synthesize attributed conclusions.
expected_user_visible_outputs: message refs or attribution refs between Agents
claim_guard_notes: This scenario must not be counted as full multi-Agent orchestration readiness.
redaction_guard_notes: Future evidence must store redacted refs only and must not include raw prompts or raw model responses.
